name: single_day_history
description: Exactly one day of historical data. len(valid_dates) = 1 < 20 -> short-circuit returns 0.0. With a 1-element series np.std would still be 0.0 BUT the function must not even compute it — using a non-zero amplitude on that single day catches an impl that skipped the clamp.
derivation: len(valid_dates) = 1 < 20 -> short-circuit returns 0.0 regardless of return magnitude.
